reviews.review_title: 🚚  The Wildest Food Truck VR Adventure!
reviews.review_description:
Serve & Swerve takes the concept of running a food truck and turns it completely on its head — in the best possible way. You’ll drive across town, refuel, clean your van, order supplies, and serve customers from one hotspot to another.

But here’s where it gets crazy (and hilarious): instead of serving food the normal way, you’ll be shooting sausages and fries at your hungry customers using a food gun! All while dodging pedestrians — and the occasional zombie — wandering into your path.

Between the night drives, quirky gameplay mechanics, and the never-ending hustle for profit, Serve & Swerve is anything but conventional. It’s chaotic, creative, and ridiculously fun — a true VR gem for anyone looking for laughs and action all in one.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive review! :) Please join my discord to stay tuned for new upcoming updates :) https://discord.com/invite/Zdf5zRXbnh
Thank you! please join my discord to share any ideas you have to improve the game and to stay tuned to new updates :) https://discord.com/invite/Zdf5zRXbnh
